name: Patient Case
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I can't work, I am not valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never be able to return to my job successfully.
coping_strategies: Avoiding interactions with HR and supervisor.
situation: Recalling a prior interaction with HR that involved feeling judged during medical leave.
auto_thought: They think I'm not trying hard enough.
behavior: Withdrawal from communication with HR and supervisor.
